## client-error-handling package

Framework-free, bounded, transport-safe client error handling.

## Functions

<table><thead><tr><th>

Function


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

[createClientErrorPipeline(options)](./client-error-handling.createclienterrorpipeline.md)


</td><td>

Create a bounded ignore/dedupe/rate/backpressure/reporting pipeline.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createDedupeFilter(input)](./client-error-handling.creatededupefilter.md)


</td><td>

Create an exact-TTL, insertion-ordered bounded dedupe filter.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createMemoryErrorReporter(input)](./client-error-handling.creatememoryerrorreporter.md)


</td><td>

Create a bounded reporter that never exposes a mutable backing array.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[createNoopErrorReporter()](./client-error-handling.createnooperrorreporter.md)


</td><td>

Create a frozen reporter that discards transport-safe records.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[normalizeBrowserErrorEvent(event, context, options)](./client-error-handling.normalizebrowsererrorevent.md)


</td><td>

Normalize own fields or verified native `ErrorEvent` WebIDL getters.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[normalizeClientError(error, context, options)](./client-error-handling.normalizeclienterror.md)


</td><td>

Normalize an unknown diagnostic into a frozen transport-safe record.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[normalizeUnhandledRejection(reason, context, options)](./client-error-handling.normalizeunhandledrejection.md)


</td><td>

Normalize an unhandled rejection with an approved event marker.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[sanitizeContext(context, options)](./client-error-handling.sanitizecontext.md)


</td><td>

Apply the transport context allowlist and omit request bodies by default.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[sanitizeText(value, options)](./client-error-handling.sanitizetext.md)


</td><td>

Strip credentials and bounded sensitive URL/text material.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[sanitizeUrl(value, options)](./client-error-handling.sanitizeurl.md)


</td><td>

Strip credentials, query, and fragment data from an absolute or relative URL.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[sanitizeValue(value, options)](./client-error-handling.sanitizevalue.md)


</td><td>

Exception-safe bounded sanitization for arbitrary structured values.


</td></tr>
